display_name_sources: Official homepage https://tsduck.io/ brands the project as TSDuck.
docs_sources: Official TSDuck website provides the user guide at /docs/tsduck.html; official GitHub README is a secondary official documentation surface.
repo_sources: source_facts.repo already contains https://github.com/tsduck/tsduck; per instruction, repo is returned as null and not second-guessed.
tags_sources: source_facts.description and executable list identify a command-line MPEG transport stream/broadcast toolkit.
